LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONERS MICHAEL COOMBS AND TAMARA WOODS' MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER IS GRANTED. MR. SINGER IS APPOINTED AS RECEIVER TO SELL THE PROPERTY AS REQUIRED BY THE APRIL 13, 2011 JUDGMENT. THERE WILL BE NO SALE TO OCCUR AND WILL BE SUBJECT TO THE OUTCOME OF THE AUGUST 19, 2011 MOTION. BASED ON MR. CUNNINGHAM'S REPRESENTATION IN OPEN COURT HE WILL BE POSTING A SUBSTANTIAL BOND TO COVER IF HE DOES NOT PREVAIL ON APPEAL. A CLARIFICATION WAS MADE THAT AN ORDER WILL BE PREPARED TO REFLECT THAT THE SALE WILL PROCEED UNLESS MR. CUNNINGHAM APPLIES FOR A STAY UNTIL AUGUST 19, 2011. MR. MCKAY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR #8189
